creator: support@fluxsoft.com
text: Running off of the 20201224 build of 13, I have a KVM switch attached to an UDOO Bolt Gear. When I switch to my Mac, after a time, FreeBSD reports the mouse and keyboard have disappeared and a timeout errors occurs. In response, FreeBSD oddly disables the USB port, thus rendering the mouse and keyboard unusable until the system is rebooted.
